name: Commercial Transactions Financing Priority

eligibility.description: Requires a written agreement entered into before the tax lien filing for commercial financing, real property construction, or obligatory disbursements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Lenders and businesses can maintain priority over a federal tax lien for disbursements made within 45 days after a tax lien filing, provided a written agreement was in place before the filing.
